content:
Just now

--

1) At night drunk Constable accidentally told the theif that he will relieve him from the prison.
Next day in the morning- “ Constable is now not able to change the statment & the theif is happy now” 😁😅
2) A boy asked his programmer friend to go live when they were in the party.
“He went live on Visual Studio Code and the boy is still not able to understand”😁
3) A girl saw a ugly object on floor , she asked her brother what is this
Her developer Brother replied this is the object calling method….😅
